LightningComponentBundle.description: Login 03 page component with muted background, social login buttons (Apple/Google), email/password fields, and footer. Designed for Experience Cloud sites.

property.name: cardTitle
property.label: Card Title
property.description: The main heading text on the login card.

property.name: cardDescription
property.label: Card Description
property.default: Login with your Apple or Google account
property.description: The subtitle text below the card heading.

property.name: brandName
property.label: Brand Name
property.description: The brand name displayed above the login card.
